findings.evidence: New line 62: `def groupLikeTensor ... := groupLike ... (g * h)`; existing `code/TauCeti/Algebra/Coalgebra/Comodule/Trivial.lean:71:def groupLike`, `:82:theorem groupLike_coact_apply`, `:89:theorem groupLike_coact`.
findings.fix: Remove `groupLikeTensor` and use `Comodule.groupLike (R := R) (C := C) (M := M ⊗[R] N) (g * h)` together with `groupLike_coact`/`groupLike_coact_apply`.
findings.issue: `Comodule.groupLikeTensor g h` is definitionally just the existing `Comodule.groupLike (g * h)`, and its coaction simp lemmas duplicate the existing group-like coaction lemmas specialized to `M ⊗[R] N`.

findings.evidence: New lines 99-100 call `Hom.ofGroupLike ... (g * h) (TensorProduct.map f k)`; existing `code/TauCeti/Algebra/Coalgebra/Comodule/Trivial.lean:96:def Hom.ofGroupLike`, `:112:theorem ofGroupLike_toLinearMap`, `:121:theorem ofGroupLike_apply`, `:130:theorem ofGroupLike_id`.
findings.fix: Remove `Hom.tensorOfGroupLike` and use `Hom.ofGroupLike (g * h) (TensorProduct.map f k)` at the call sites.
findings.issue: `Hom.tensorOfGroupLike` directly re-exposes the existing `Hom.ofGroupLike` applied to `(g * h)` and `TensorProduct.map f k`; the following `toLinearMap`, `tmul`, and `id` lemmas are special cases of existing `ofGroupLike_*` lemmas plus Mathlib `TensorProduct.map` simp lemmas.

findings.evidence: New lines 153-155 define `trivialTensor` via `groupLikeTensor 1 1`, and line 197 defines `Hom.tensorOfTrivial` via `Hom.tensorOfGroupLike 1 1`; existing `code/TauCeti/Algebra/Coalgebra/Comodule/Trivial.lean:214:def trivial`, `:223:theorem trivial_coact_apply`, `:229:theorem trivial_coact`, `:235:def Hom.ofTrivial`.
findings.fix: Remove the trivial tensor wrappers and use `Comodule.trivial (M := M ⊗[R] N)` and `Hom.ofTrivial (TensorProduct.map f k)`.
findings.issue: `Comodule.trivialTensor` is just the existing `Comodule.trivial` on the tensor product, since `1 * 1 = 1`; `Hom.tensorOfTrivial` likewise duplicates `Hom.ofTrivial (TensorProduct.map f k)`.

summary: The PR adds named tensor/trivial APIs that are direct wrappers around existing TauCeti group-like/trivial comodule constructors and morphism constructors. These declarations should be removed or replaced by uses of the existing APIs specialized to `M ⊗[R] N` and `g * h`.
